title: Learn to use plants as medicine
intro: Hands-on workshops for anyone who wants to understand herbal medicine — not as a trend, but as a practical skill.

workshopList.title: Introduction to Herbal Medicine
workshopList.description: A grounding overview of Western herbal medicine — what it is, how it works, and how to start using plants safely at home.

workshopList.title: Herbs for Hormonal Health
workshopList.description: An in-depth look at the plants most relevant to endometriosis, PCOS, perimenopause, and menstrual irregularity.

workshopList.title: Make Your Own Herbal Blends
workshopList.description: A practical hands-on session creating personalised teas, tinctures, and topicals.
